pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.6.0 to 3.3.13 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE namespace changes.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Java 21 as a baseline and uses javax.* namespaces, causing runtime failures or incompatibility with Java 21 features and Jakarta EE 9+ APIs.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK baseline.
pom.xml.why_exists: The build will fail to compile or run if the source/target compatibility remains at 17 while the environment or dependencies require Java 21 features or bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add explicit dependency for jakarta.validation-api to replace the removed javax.validation API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes javax.validation; code using validation annotations will fail to compile without the Jakarta EE equivalent.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jakarta.xml.bind-api version to 4.0.6-SNAPSHOT to align with Jakarta EE 10/11 standards required by Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older JAXB versions (2.x) use javax.* namespaces which are incompatible with Spring Boot 3's Jakarta EE 9+ baseline.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade jaxb-runtime version to 3.0.2 to ensure compatibility with the updated Jakarta XML Bind API.
pom.xml.why_exists: Mismatched JAXB API and runtime versions can cause runtime linkage errors or classloading issues in a Jakarta EE environment.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Co.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Co.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; code fails to compile with 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Po.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Po.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Us.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/domain/Us.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments; the class Email is now located in jakarta.validation.constraints.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.general_idea: Migrate the PostConstruct annotation import from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/security/.why_exists: The javax.annotation package is no longer available in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x (which runs on Jakarta EE 9+), causing a compilation error due to missing class.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/AuthC.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/AuthC.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3.x).

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Authe.general_idea: Migrate validation annotations from the legacy javax package to the Jakarta EE namespace required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Authe.why_exists: The javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ and Spring Boot 3.x; code using javax.validation will fail to compile due to missing classes.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Comme.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Comme.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/PostC.general_idea: Migrate validation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.x.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/PostC.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation does not exist in the classpath when using Spring Boot 3.x which relies on Jakarta EE namespaces.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/PostF.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/PostF.why_exists: javax.validation package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compile error 'package javax.validation.constraints does not exist'.

src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Updat.general_idea: Migrate validation annotation import from javax to jakarta namespace to align with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by Spring Boot 3.
src/main/java/com/example/demo/web/Updat.why_exists: Compile error: package javax.validation.constraints does not exist in Jakarta EE 9+ environments (Spring Boot 3).

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Rename deprecated MongoDB GridFS configuration property to the new Spring Boot 3.x format.
src/main/resources/application.yml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for the legacy 'grid-fs-database' property; using it results in an unrecognized property warning or failure to configure the GridFS bucket correctly.

src/test/java/com/example/demo/Integrati.general_idea: Update import path for LocalServerPort to match Spring Boot 3.3 package structure.
src/test/java/com/example/demo/Integrati.why_exists: Class org.springframework.boot.web.server.LocalServerPort does not exist in Spring Boot 3.3; compilation fails with 'package does not exist' or 'cannot find symbol'.
